title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Select Trust - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Select Trust - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Select Trust, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
